channel.title: 战况追踪 — Global Conflict Monitor
channel.description: 实时追踪全球主要冲突态势，多源聚合情报

item.title: [俄乌战争] FIGHTER → DAGESTAN : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Ukraine)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: FIGHTER / DAGESTAN. Location: Ukraine. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 8 sources.

item.title: [俄乌战争] REUTERS → UKRAINE : Occupy territory (Moscow, Moskva, Russia)
item.description: GDELT Event: Occupy territory. Actors: REUTERS / UKRAINE. Location: Moscow, Moskva, Russia. Goldstein Scale: -9.5. Mentioned in 2 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] ISRAELI → ISLAMIC : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Tehran, Tehran, Iran)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: ISRAELI / ISLAMIC. Location: Tehran, Tehran, Iran. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 8 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] HAMAS → ISRAEL : Engage in mass killings (Israel)
item.description: GDELT Event: Engage in mass killings. Actors: HAMAS / ISRAEL. Location: Israel. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 5 sources.

item.title: [美伊对峙] AMERICAN → MILITARY : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Tehran, Tehran, Iran)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: AMERICAN / MILITARY. Location: Tehran, Tehran, Iran. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 2 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Use unconventional violence, not specified below. Actors: UNITED NATIONS / SYRIA. Location: Sweida, As Suwayda', Syria. Goldstein Scale: -9.0. Mentioned in 8 sources.
